meaning: adj.流电的,抽搐的,以流电所产的
examples: It is usually caused by galvanic sources on the card.
Galvanic facials increase the skin's ability to absorb products.
Nu Skin has stopped imports of the Galvanic Spa facial unit pending resolution of this matter.
Measuring galvanic skin response--changes in the electrical resistance, that is--can gauge emotional involvement.
